summary: Zero implementation exists for any p5 deliverable; migrations/ and packages/ directories must be created. Two spec defects found: missing is_system column in c001 DDL and RLS column-name mismatch (app_id vs application_id) in c014 policy — both must be fixed before plan finalizes ordering. p5-c009 CompiledState upgrade is highest-risk MVP change: touches hot-path ArcSwap state and requires full consumer audit in fdb-gateway before execution.
key_gaps: No migrations/ directory — must be created for p5-c001
No packages/ directory — must be created for p5-c010, p5-c011
CompiledState has no a2ui_catalog field — p5-c009 adds it with compile-breaking change
agui.rs line 83 still returns 'ag-ui/1.0' — p5-c003 must update label + test line 253
fdb-app/src/a2ui/ module does not exist — p5-c014 must create it

spec_defects.defect: is_system column referenced in seed INSERT but missing from applications table DDL
spec_defects.action: Add is_system boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false to CREATE TABLE flint_a2ui.applications

spec_defects.defect: resolve_components_with_overrides() RLS references ra.app_id and ra.role_name but role_assignments table uses application_id and has no role_name column
spec_defects.action: Fix column references in c014 policy SQL to match c001 DDL

OQ-10.mitigation: Stub semantic_search() with RAISE NOTICE; unblock all other changes

OQ-13.resolution: Pin genui to exact version 0.9.2 in pubspec.lock

OQ-14.resolution: GitHub-path install for OpenDesign — marketplace not required for Phase 5
